l298n_setup.message0: Initialize motor %1 EN pin %2 IN1 pin %3 IN2 pin %4
l298n_setup.tooltip: Initialize L298N motor driver (with PWM speed regulation)

l298n_setup_no_enable.message0: Initialize motor %1 IN1 pin %2 IN2 pin %3 (no speed regulation)
l298n_setup_no_enable.tooltip: Initialize the L298N motor driver (no PWM speed regulation, Enable pin connected to high level)

l298n_forward_for.tooltip: The motor automatically stops after moving forward for a specified time.

l298n_backward_for.tooltip: The motor automatically stops after reversing for a specified time.

l298n_run_for.tooltip: The motor runs in the specified direction for the specified time

l298n_get_speed.tooltip: Get the current speed value of the motor (0-255)

l298n_is_moving.tooltip: Check if the motor is moving

l298n_get_direction.tooltip: Get the current running direction of the motor (0=forward, 1=reverse, -1=stop)

l298n_reset.tooltip: Re-enable motor motion after using timed run
